reviews.comment:
La atención no es buena:
El lavadero un desastre para cargar combustible siempre hay colas mucho más largas que en otras estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
The service isn't good:
The car wash is a disaster; fuel lines are always much longer than at other gas stations.

reviews.comment:
Hermoso el museo del automóvil. El tramite para el registro es agil y sin problemas. Excelente atencion .

(Translated by Google)
The car museum is beautiful. The registration process is quick and easy. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdzdHVUR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Ideal para cuando uno llega a la madrugada a Capital. Se carga nafta en 2 minutos, se puede comer algo en el bar 24 hs. Los baños en buen estado.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for when you arrive in the capital in the early hours. You can fill up with gas in 2 minutes, and there's a 24-hour bar where you can grab a bite to eat. The restrooms are in good condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReFpPOGJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Trámite el carnet de conducir, la atención me pareció buena pero deberían modernizar el sistema ya que todo es presencial y podría ser en un 90% de forma remota (no dan ni siquiera turnos on line).

(Translated by Google)
I applied for my driver's license; the service seemed good, but they should modernize the system since everything is done in person and it could be 90% done remotely (they don't even give online appointments).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbjlieWdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Aunque siempre hay cola para la carga de combustible, la espera es rápida ; su atención,  es con educación, cordialidad y buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Although there's always a line for fuel, the wait is quick; their service is polite, friendly, and good.
